channel.title: Joins/Merge on Maya Ylagan
channel.description: Recent content in Joins/Merge on Maya Ylagan

item.title: Exploratory Data Analysis
item.description: Introduction: The data used in this project was collected from the USDA’s Atlas of Rural and Small-Town America. Located at: https://www.ers.usda.gov/data-products/atlas-of-rural-and-small-town-america/ These datasets were interesting to me as they contained data for the entire nation, but each observation was a small local. So this dataset gives a good representation of the country by area, population was not accounted for in this project, and had unique county classifications and employment measurments that sparked my curiosity.
